details.test: Task 1: Request info for cheapest qualifying floor plan
Task 2: Add three evening social events in May to itinerary
Task 3: Cost estimate for 1-bedroom under $350k and email it
Task 4: Schedule tour in building with indoor pool & library (<=8 floors)
Task 5: Request pet approval for 20-pound dog
Task 6: Request 2-night accessible 1BR guest suite under $180/night
Task 7: Save highest-rated hospital and nearest clinic to favorites
Task 8: Create 3-month move-in checklist and email it
Task 9: Choose weekly housekeeping service package under $600 and apply
